trades.market: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 3.5% for the year ending in April 2026?
trades.catalyst: Upcoming CPI data release; current inflation trends suggest stickiness.
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected drop in CPI; revisions to previous data.

trades.market: Will the rate of CPI inflation be above 3.4% for the year ending in May 2026?
trades.catalyst: Anticipation of continued inflationary pressures; May CPI data release.
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected dovish shift by the Fed; significant supply-side improvements.

trades.market: Will the gold close price be above $4506.99 on Apr 30, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
trades.catalyst: Inflationary environment and geopolitical tensions driving gold prices higher.
trades.risk_notes: Sharp rise in interest rates; unexpected resolution of geopolitical conflicts.

trades.market: Will the brent crude oil close price be above $84.99 on Apr 30, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
trades.risk_notes: Increased oil production; unexpected drop in demand.

trades.market: Will the gold close price be above 4794  USD/t.oz on Apr 16, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
trades.catalyst: Current gold price trends and market momentum.
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected market correction; significant dollar strength.

trades.market: Will the gold close price be above 4764  USD/t.oz on Apr 16, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
trades.catalyst: Current gold price trends and market momentum.

avoid.reason: Recession market has a wide range of possible outcomes and is difficult to predict with certainty.
Weather predictions are inherently uncertain beyond a short timeframe.
Fed policy is difficult to predict with certainty.

notes: The current macro environment is inflationary, with commodity prices showing upward pressure. CPI data is expected to remain elevated. Geopolitical risks are also contributing to uncertainty.
